docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY YANCEY, STARLENE AS TO DEFENDANT BURGER KING ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-03-1996 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT C

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF YANCEY, STARLENE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BURGER KING $200.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $200.00, DEFT. WAIVED UNTIMELY SERVICE OF PROCESS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BURGER KING
